name: claude-ecosystem-3-0-dev
description: Dev tooling for Ecosystem 3.0 — hook smoke runner + optional eslint. Not published; not bootstrapped to user projects (excluded by /ecosystem:bootstrap never-copy zone).

scripts.test:orchestrator: node tests/orchestrator/coverage-oracle.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/gate-risk-classifier.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/args-parsing.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/concerns-propagation.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/fidelity-oracle.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/audit-fidelity-wiring.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/validate-feature-impl-wiring.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/feature-to-tdd-impl-wiring.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/env-readiness.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/capability-probe.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/remediation-guard.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/design-coverage-oracle.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/runtime-readiness.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/runtime-smoke-readiness-wiring.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/consilium-synth.test.cjs && node tests/orchestrator/decide-architecture-foundation-wiring.test.cjs
scripts.verify: npm run verify:hooks && npm run test:adapters && npm run test:orchestrator && npm run smoke:orchestrator && npm run test:audit && npm run test:product && npm run gen:map:check && npm run gen:procmap:check && npm run gen:glossary:check && npm run smoke:procmap && npm run smoke:mapshell
